{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Monarch platforms
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Monarch platforms]] are floating above the [[arena]] and remain active.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
